creator: dave@jetcafe.org
text:
I'm happy to report that using poudriere with a jail for stable/13 as of e7d9a68e8 with Ivan's patch to the makefile backed out builds LibreSSL successfully. (Other things have broken (e.g. drm-kmod) but that's not the focus of this bug.)

I'm thinking this bug is resolved, but I'll let others weigh in.
